title: Leandra pratensis
taxonomy: Leandra pratensis is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is native to South America and belongs to the genus Leandra. The genus Leandra is part of the subfamily Vaccinioideae. Leandra pratensis is classified as a shrub or a low-growing tree. It is known for its small white flowers and is often found in subtropical and temperate regions.
